title: Wano’s Long Night Begins to Break
description: On pages 7–9, this part focuses on Unknown person #7, Momonosuke, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #9, Beast Pirates, Kaido as Luffy awakens Gear Fifth and fights Kaido as Onigashima’s fall, Wano’s fire festival, and twenty years of suffering converge.
scene: Luffy awakens Gear Fifth and fights Kaido as Onigashima’s fall, Wano’s fire festival, and twenty years of suffering converge.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Chopper, these two are in bad shape!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Chopper, zero's not opening his eyes!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Dr. Chopper, we need you!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Miyagi, there's too many casualties coming in!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I'll lend you a hand!!

dialogue.speaker: Momonosuke
dialogue.text: Zunesha?

dialogue.speaker: Momonosuke
dialogue.text: Zunesha?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Can you hear me?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I have given it a lot of thought...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: And I have decided...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ...not to open our borders just yet.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Very well... I shall follow your lead.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I trust your judgment!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Thank you, I'm sorry...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: What was that? An earth- quake?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: You trash are getting ahead of yourselves!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: We still have greater numbers than you!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: You shouldn't have let your guards down!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Just give up!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: There's no way Kaido-san actually lost!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We're the crew of an Emperor after all!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: These guys...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Wanna scrap?! I've got tons of fuel left in the tank!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Not so fast, frankly- San!!

dialogue.speaker: Beast Pirates
dialogue.text: Hold it, Beast Pirates!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Your lives were already spared once!!

dialogue.speaker: Kaido
dialogue.text: Y-Young Master Yamato!! We-

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Our General Just stopped Onigashima from plummeting to the ground!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: You're talkin' like you're on their side!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you keep fighting after being saved by the enemy that beat you...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: I'll personally grind you to dust myself!!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 31 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
